---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new API feature, XML manipulation helper, or presentation capability.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### 💡 Rationale / Use Case

Describe why this feature is needed, how it helps your workflow, and what problem it solves.

### 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Provide a conceptual code example showing how you would like the new API to behave:

```js
const ppt = await PPTXTemplater.load('template.pptx');

// Conceptual API usage
ppt.useSlide(1).someNewApiMethod({
  param: 'value'
});
```

### 📋 OpenXML / PowerPoint Details (Optional)

If applicable, describe what XML structures (`p:spTree`, `a:tbl`, etc.) or PowerPoint elements are modified by this feature.
